skills.name: Aquatic/Polar Mobility
skills.description: Lets you move more freely in water. Also prevents you from being slowed down by terrain effects, such as deep snow.

levels.description: Increases your evade window and prevents lowered movement speed.
Greatly increases evade window and prevents lowered movement speed.

skills.name: Muck Resistance
skills.description: Reduces impairments to mobility while stuck in monster muck.

levels.description: Reduces limits on movement speed and evasion.

skills.name: Water Attack
skills.description: Increases water element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.)

skills.name: Ice Resistance
skills.description: Increases ice resistance. Also improves defense at higher levels.

skills.name: Focus
skills.description: Increases the fill rate for weapons with gauges and the charge rate for weapons with charge attacks.

levels.description: Increases gauge fill rate by 5% and reduces charge times by 5%.
Increases gauge fill rate by 10% and reduces charge times by 10%.
Increases gauge fill rate by 20% and reduces charge times by 15%.

skills.name: Latent Power
skills.description: Temporarily increases affinity and reduces stamina depletion when certain conditions are met.

levels.description: While active, increases affinity by 10% and reduces stamina depletion by 30%.
While active, increases affinity by 20% and reduces stamina depletion by 30%.
While active, increases affinity by 30% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
While active, increases affinity by 40% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
While active, increases affinity by 50% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
While active, increases affinity by 50%, reduces stamina depletion by 50%. Triggers easier.
While active, increases affinity by 60%, reduces stamina depletion by 50%. Triggers easier.
